name: Baked Eggplant Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Peel and cube the eggplant. Cook in boiling salted water for 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.
3. Mix barbecue sauce and minced onion. Let stand for 5 minutes.
4. Boil tomatoes for 2 minutes, then drain and remove skin. Slice thinly.
5. Combine barbecue sauce, eggplant, garlic, and parsley. Spoon mixture into a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
6. Layer with half of the tomato slices. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients, finishing with an eggplant layer.
7. Mix bread crumbs, melted margarine, and grated Parmesan cheese. Sprinkle over the top.
8. Bake for 45 minutes.
